top_signals.title: Fed Chair Warsh makes first hires at central bank, including ‘Project 2025’ author
top_signals.summary: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia CEO Pitches ‘Insane’ AI Returns to Billionaire Families
top_signals.summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang touted “insane” returns for investors willing to bet on the AI boom, seeking to dispel lingering concerns around the big sums spent on artificial intelligence and its long-term profitability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S., Iran intensify attacks as ceasefire frays, peace talks stall
top_signals.summary: The regional conflict has hardened into a stalemate as the U.S. and Iran failed to turn a fragile ceasefire into a lasting peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Supply Shock to Slash India’s Oil Demand Growth to Pandemic Low
top_signals.summary: Analysts have slashed their estimates of India’s oil demand growth this year, with the consumption uptick to be the weakest since the Covid pandemic as the supply crunch and higher fuel prices slow gasoline and diesel demand. Analysts Kpler and Rystad Energy have slashed their gasoline and diesel demand growth estimates for this year by between 30% and 90%, according to figures cited by Bloomberg. Despite the major downward revisions to fuel demand growth in the world’s third-biggest crude oil importer, analysts don’t see this…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Open Book Review of Northern Ireland Executive Budget
top_signals.summary: Review into Northern Ireland Executive Finances presenting options for the Executive to consider to put finances on sustainable footing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: HM Treasury: 2026 COVID-19 Cost Tracker update
top_signals.summary: Official Statistics on the cost of measures announced in response to the COVID-19 pandemic and how much the government has spent on these measures so far.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Palo Alto Networks tops earnings as AI fuels cybersecurity urgency
top_signals.summary: The beat comes on lowered expectations, after the company gave disappointing guidance in February that fell short of analyst estimates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ulta shares pop as beauty retailer beats Wall Street expectations and hikes earnings outlook
top_signals.summary: Ulta Beauty beat on the top and bottom lines for its fiscal first quarter on Tuesday as CEO Kecia Steelman praised the company's strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Pulte appointment as spy chief would give a Trump attack dog access to the 'crown jewels' of intelligence
top_signals.summary: In his role atop the housing finance agency, Bill Pulte has used his access to mortgage records to refer some top Trump opponents for prosecution.

top_signals.title: USA Rare Earth selects South Carolina for rare earth metals and magnet plant
top_signals.summary: The build will be the company’s third in the US.
